expectations.text: Housing is identified as the largest expense category ($2,200)
expectations.evidence: Housing ranked #1 at $2,200.00 (65.9%), described as 'dominant expense category'

expectations.text: Spending is broken down by account (Chase Checking vs Amex Gold)
expectations.evidence: Account Split section with dollar totals: Chase Checking $3,086.60, Amex Gold $251.45

expectations.text: At least one transaction is flagged as notable or unusual
expectations.evidence: Rent Payment: $2,200.00 flagged using IQR method as 'well above the upper fence, clear outlier'

expectations.text: Categories are ranked or sorted by total spend amount
expectations.evidence: Table with categories ranked 1-9 by amount with share percentages

expectations.text: Missing values or data quality issues are mentioned (even if none found)
expectations.evidence: Data Quality Notes: 'Zero missing values across all columns, No duplicate records'
